case_title: ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP VS. JAMES CERNY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1200 4TH STREET # 417, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94158, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $129.99 PER DAY , (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP SERVED MAY-06-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-06-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP SERVED MAY-06-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906) AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 210037906) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESSEX PORTFOLIO LP SERVED MAY-24-2023, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
